_description: All Next.js pages in the Proximity app (excludes API routes). Update PAGE_DESCRIPTIONS in generate-knowledge.mjs when adding new pages.

pages.description: Hero/landing page — featured listings, CTA, and map preview
Landlord public profile — their listings and contact info
About page — team info and project background
Add listing form — landlords create new rental listings
Add sublease form — students can post their own sublease listings
Browse page — filterable listing grid with map split view
Campus Hub — WashU dorm directory and dorm reviews
Admin dashboard — user management, table CRUD, review moderation
Landlord dashboard — listing management, metrics (views, saves, funnel chart)
Student dashboard — saved listings, profile, matchmaking history
View-as page — admin impersonation for debugging
Matchmaking concierge — roommate matching form and results
